name: Sriracha Arena Sport Club
nameThai: ศรีราชาอารีน่า สปอร์ตคลับ
addressFull: 888 Moo 6, Sukhumvit Road, Thung Suk La, Si Racha, Chon Buri 20130
hours: Badminton courts 09:00-24:00 daily according to the official court page. Google Maps shows the wider sport club opening at 06:00.

courts.notes: The operator describes six international-standard courts and publishes court-shoe rules to protect the surface.

booking.studentRate: ฿300 for two hours during published student windows
booking.notes: The official rate page does not show a last-updated date; confirm before booking.

equipment.shoeHire: Available from the on-site sport shop; fee unpublished

coaching.groupRate: Badminton academy published at ฿2,000 per month
coaching.notes: The official academy page describes coaching by a former Thai youth national player with more than ten years' badminton experience; its last update date is not shown.

englishEvidence: The operator publishes English navigation, English facility labels, English contact details and an email booking path, and serves international-company sports events. No direct current English reply from badminton reception was captured.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Players seeking a small badminton-only hall may find this large multi-sport complex busier than a neighbourhood court.

praise: Recent Thai reviews describe a large complex with multiple courts, extensive parking, clean bathrooms and food or drink service.
Badminton-specific comments praise the modern, open hall and new-looking rubber floor.
The Badminton Association of Thailand has used the venue for a regional junior championship, supporting its competition capability.
complaints: One Thai review complains about cigarette and vape smoke in covered areas, especially when rain concentrates people indoors.

comparison.differentiator: The batch's most fully documented competition-scale complex, with six Pulastic courts, official tiered rates, a junior academy and extensive ancillary facilities.
